signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Stay as Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation and Trump Replace
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Stay as Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation and Trump Replacement Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Jerome Powell stated he will serve as Chair Pro Tem if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his term, as required by law, and has no intention of leaving the Fed Board until an ongoing investigation concludes with transparency.[1]
